title: Style Conflict
prompt: The user first asked for snake_case, then later said to follow the existing code style. The surrounding code uses camelCase everywhere. What should a new variable use? Submit JSON: {"optionIds":["A"]}.

options.text: camelCase, because the latest instruction points to existing project style.
snake_case, because the first instruction always wins.
A random mix of both styles.
A new style unrelated to the project.
